zh.lifeSummary: 當Gentile Orsini於1197年4月出生在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬時，他的父親Matteo Rosso Orsini19歲，母親Perna Caetani19歲。他和Constanza di Cardinale至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1246年11月15日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

nameMeanings.name: Gentile
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmine, Vito, Domenic, Rocco, Giuseppe, Gino, Antonio, Pasquale, Gennaro, Sal.

Italian: from the personal name Gentile, a continuation of Late Latin Gentilis, from Latin gens (genitive gentis) ‘tribe, family, stock’, meaning ‘of the same stock’ and then ‘non-Christian, pagan’; as a medieval name it was an omen or well-wishing name with the sense ‘noble, courteous’, also ‘delicate, charming, graceful’ (Italian gentile). In some cases the surname may have arisen from a nickname, sometimes possibly ironical, from the same word.

variants.name: Heifetz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eliezer, Gilad, Chayim.
Jewish (from Belarus and Lithuania): nickname from Yiddish kheyfets (Hebrew ḥefets) ‘desire, wish’; or from an archaic personal name of the same etymology.

History: This is one of the old Ashkenazic surnames. In Eastern Europe, it was used by rabbinical families well before the mass adoption of surnames by local Jews at the turn of the 19th century. Most likely, it is the same Ashkenazic family as the one known in northern Italy since the end of the 15th century as Ḥefets in Hebrew sources and Gentile in Christian sources (see Gentile 3).

variants.name: Gentle
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English, Old French gentil ‘high born, noble’ (from Latin gentilis, from gens ‘family, tribe’, itself from the root gen- ‘to be born’).

variants.name: Gentilini
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Gino, Bruna, Dante.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Gentile  .

variants.name: Gentili
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Amilcare, Enrico, Leno, Primo, Romolo, Sylvio, Vincenzo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Gentile  .

variants.name: Gentil
meanings: French and Portuguese: nickname from Old French and Portuguese gentil (in Old French a derivative of gent; see Gent ) ‘high born, noble’, hence ‘noble of character or conduct, courteous’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gentile Orsini was born in April 1197, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, his father, Matteo Rosso Orsini, was 19 and his mother, Perna Caetani, was 19. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Constanza di Cardinale. He died on 15 November 1246, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gentile Orsini est né en avril 1197, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, son père, Matteo Rosso Orsini, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Perna Caetani, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Constanza di Cardinale. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1246, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie.

Er hatte mit Constanza di Cardinale mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. November 1246 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Gentile Orsini(이)가 1197년 4월 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matteo Rosso Orsini(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Perna Caetani(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Constanza di Cardinale(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 11월 15일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gentile Orsini родился апрель 1197 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия, его отцу по имени Matteo Rosso Orsini было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Perna Caetani, 19. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Constanza di Cardinale. Он умер 15 ноября 1246 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия.
